completed_steps.description: Loaded documentation requirements for 12 project types from CSV
Checked for existing docs (found extensive architecture docs), chose full_rescan mode, initialized state file
Detected project structure: 11 Laravel packages in monorepo, confirmed all packages with composer.json analysis
Discovered existing documentation in /docs/architecture/ (25+ detailed domain docs), assessed coverage
Analyzed technology stack: PHP 8.2+, Laravel 11+, Eloquent ORM, PHPUnit/Pest testing, 42 total migrations
Performed deep scan of all 11 packages: read composer.json, analyzed service providers, models, repositories, events, migrations, test coverage
Generated comprehensive BMAD-style output documents (6 master docs + state file)

findings.dependency_direction: All packages depend on prophoto-contracts (foundation), forms clean DAG
integration_points: Asset pipeline: Upload → Ingest → Session Matching → Assets → Intelligence
Gallery workflow: Booking → Assets → Gallery → Sharing
Event-driven: 14+ events defined, 1+ listeners registered in code
documentation_gaps: Some complex services (SessionMatchingService, IntelligenceExecutionService) lack inline documentation
Event listener registration incomplete in some packages (verify in boot methods)
architectural_strengths: Clean separation of concerns via Laravel packages
known_issues: 7 packages lack unit tests (critical gap for booking, gallery, interactions, invoicing, notifications, access, ai)
Some ServiceProviders may not have event listener registration (ingest, intelligence)
No performance optimization notes in code for large galleries

outputs_generated.description: Master entry point with navigation and system overview
Strategic architecture, patterns, technology stack, data flows
Complete directory structure and critical file locations for all packages
All services, repositories, models, events, contracts, DTOs, enums across packages
Event definitions, interface contracts, DTOs, enums with code examples
Complete database schema, 30+ tables, relationships, migrations
Setup, testing, deployment, common tasks, debugging
This state file - scan metadata and findings summary

critical_gaps: Booking package (workflow engine) has no tests
Gallery package (complex schema, 15 migrations) has no tests

next_steps_for_phase_2: Project-Level PRD generation using all documentation
Feature dependency analysis based on event flows
Integration testing strategy for cross-package communication
Test coverage expansion plan for untested packages

recommendations.action: Add unit tests for prophoto-booking (session models, workflow logic)
recommendations.impact: Workflow engine is critical, currently untested

recommendations.action: Add integration tests for asset→intelligence pipeline
recommendations.impact: Core intelligence generation flow needs coverage

recommendations.action: Add OpenAPI/Swagger documentation for API endpoints
recommendations.impact: Better developer experience and API contract clarity

recommendations.action: Verify event listener registrations in IngestServiceProvider and IntelligenceServiceProvider
recommendations.impact: Ensure event-driven communication is wired correctly

recommendations.action: Profile and optimize SessionMatchingService (critical path in ingest)
recommendations.impact: Matching performance affects user upload experience

recommendations.action: Replace NullAssetMetadataExtractor with real metadata extraction (EXIF, IPTC, XMP)
recommendations.impact: Enables better asset discovery and organization

validation_notes: All 11 packages confirmed present with active composer.json files
Technology stack verified: PHP 8.2+, Laravel 11+, Eloquent, PHPUnit/Pest
Event definitions consistent across packages (using prophoto-contracts/Events)
Service bindings follow Laravel ServiceProvider pattern
Multi-tenancy model consistent (studio_id, organization_id on all key tables)
Migration counts match package complexity (gallery: 15, assets: 6, ingest: 2, etc.)
summary: BMAD Document Project Phase 1 (Analysis) completed successfully. Comprehensive documentation generated for 11-package Laravel monorepo. Deep scan captured architecture patterns, all 28+ models, 22+ services, 14 events, 13 contracts, 42 migrations. Test coverage assessment completed (4 packages tested, 7 gaps identified). Ready for Phase 2 (Project-Level PRD generation).
